channel.title: Punit Mistry — Blog
channel.description: Articles about web development, React, Node.js, and building modern applications.

item.title: Building a Real-Time Admin Dashboard with React & Recharts
item.description: A deep dive into architecting a comprehensive analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, user management, and role-based access control.

item.title: Automating Customer Support with a WhatsApp Business Bot
item.description: How I built an intelligent WhatsApp bot using Node.js that handles orders, integrates with external APIs, and scales to thousands of conversations.

item.title: Scaffolding Express Apps: Building a CLI Generator
item.description: Lessons from creating a visual CLI tool that generates Express.js applications with pre-configured middleware, database connections, and API routes.
